All (238)5 ★ (210)4 ★ (22)Critical (6)Unresponded (4)
RK
Capt. Rajesh K. · OceanLink Shipping
Ship Agents · #PORT-47862 · 6 May 2026
★★★★★

Pilot boarded on time at 13:00 in moderate sea. Quick handover with master. Tug rendezvous was sharp, both ASDs in position before we entered the channel. Berthed safely at T4 by 14:45. Documentation was prompt. Will book again.

PunctualProfessionalClear communication
VK
Vikas K. · Saffron Fleet Mgmt
Multi Modal Transport · #PORT-48156 · 14 May 2026
★★★★★

Both ASD tugs arrived 20 min before pilot boarded. Bridge team comms over VHF were textbook. Got us alongside without a single touch. The kind of professionalism we need at JNPT.

PunctualReliable fleet
AR
Anil R. · Mariner Shipping
Ship Agents · #PORT-47702 · 02 May 2026
★★★★☆

Job done well overall. Slight delay (~25 min) due to weather; pilot was very transparent about the reason and communicated proactively. Berthing itself was smooth.

Clear communication
SP
Sunil P. · Bharat Shipping
Ship Agents · #PORT-47445 · 22 Apr 2026
★★★★★

Capt. Sharma is one of the most experienced pilots at JNPT. Brought our vessel into a tricky berth in fading light without incident. Highly recommend Mumbai Marine.

ProfessionalReliable fleet
